name: Indoor Golf of Utah
address: 2453 Wildcat Way Suite C, Woods Cross, UT 84010
about: Indoor Golf of Utah provides a year-round golf experience using state-of-the-art TrackMan simulation technology. The facility is designed to be accessible regardless of weather or season, offering a premium indoor golf environment. Members can enjoy unlimited access to multiple simulation bays, professional coaching, and a supportive community aimed at helping golfers of all skill levels improve their game. The venue operates on a membership model with various tiers and emphasizes the use of cutting-edge technology for both play and skill development.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art TrackMan simulation technology for accurate ball and club tracking
24/7 access to facility with professional coaching available
Ability to play over 100 world-class golf courses year-round regardless of weather
Access to data-driven performance insights and swing analysis
Vibrant community atmosphere with leagues and events

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium dual-radar technology providing the most precise ball and club tracking available

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players are expected to bring their own golf clubs to use with the simulation technology.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or beverages are permitted at the facility.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18 holes typically take 2-3 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Indoor Golf of Utah is family-friendly and welcomes junior golfers to practice and play.
